specific_mechanism: Vine pruning systems (Guyot, cordon, head training) trade fruit yield against shoot vigor; aggressive winter pruning forces concentrated next-season growth
llm_application: LLM pruning schedule trade-offs: aggressive weight-pruning forces concentrated capacity in remaining weights; choosing pruning topology (Guyot-style head vs cordon-style branching) shapes downstream capability.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes viticulture topological-defect mapping as proposed.
